$comment: c14d shipped <fcntl.h> + the first runtime exercise of the c14c variadic-externs extension. O_*/F_* constants + struct flock + the VARIADIC open (2-arg AND 3-arg) / fcntl (dynamic libc.so.6). The opens hit nonexistent paths (fail cleanly, no side effect); the constant VALUES + struct flock field access are the witness → exit 42 on a real Linux runtime. Two elf targets (POSIX header, availableObjectFormats:[elf], Linux WSL run target). Runs on linux-gcc + native arm64 CI legs; cross-compiles locally. Release arm runs the optimizer over the variadic calls. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop a surface → O_RDONLY/open/flock undefined → compile fails; revert the variadic support → the 3-arg open fails to type-check.
